MANOSABA-LESSER_STRENGTH_POTION.descript: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] at the end of your turn.

MANOSABA-TREDECIM.title: Tredecim
